title: AWS Transfer Manager, Concurrency, and Migration
description: A large-transfer service starts new work on deprecated s3/manager, accepts unstable defaults, multiplies concurrency per request, and cannot bound memory, descriptors, or partial failures. Learners cumulatively produce transfer-manager adoption and resource budget through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Adopt feature/s3/transfermanager 0.3.2 as a pinned pre-v1 dependency with explicit compatibility review and rollback.
Inventory deprecated feature/s3/manager use, map behavior and options, characterize outputs, and migrate behind contract tests.
Choose UploadObject, DownloadObject, and GetObject by streaming, seekability, checksum, destination, and ownership requirements.
